guiding_hypothesis.question: Can a representation-respecting typed decomposition of physical cases into admissible possibility, fixed-family dynamics, record formation, access, normalized capability, and candidate finality only after explicit factorization tests classify real frozen evidence more stably and discriminatively than its strongest reductive, context-relative, structural, and pluralist rivals, or do real cases collapse the distinctions, change under admissible construction, or expose a missing type?

candidate_story.plain_english_summary: Physics specifies admissible possibilities and transformations; some transformations stabilize records; access determines which distinctions can condition later action; capability is the normalized operational task set rather than raw access; finality is only a candidate when settlement or selection cannot be factored through the preceding types under a named scope and cannot be reopened by admissible continuation.
candidate_story.finality_nonclaim: A bounded no-factor-found result does not establish absolute non-reducibility or physical finality.

access_capability_boundary.access: Changed conditioning, observability, reachability, or control relation.
access_capability_boundary.capability: A strict change in the operational task set under a named common normalization.
access_capability_boundary.reopening_condition: A real case in which access is constitutive of capability rather than a separable factor.

widely_known_conceptual_ingredients.statement: Physical theories commonly specify admissible states, histories, fields, constraints, or alternatives.
Dynamics, persistent records, observability and control, operational task sets, and boundary or closure conditions are familiar explanatory ingredients across established fields.

repo_new_assembly_and_machinery.statement: The six terms are assembled as non-exclusive typed diagnoses rather than a chronology.
Frozen source packets, reproducible bundle identity, explicit method-premise dependence, and a non-upgrading receiver assessment separate source truth from synthesis.
A cumulative eight-gate contract preserves non-passing outcomes, rejects split-chain artificial success, and applies a bounded label-reversal control.
Access and normalized capability are separated through a named comparison frame, while access-constitutive constructions remain explicit reopening cases.

provisional_synthetic_results.statement: The transition vocabulary was mechanically distinguishable across 35 stipulated cases and 16 aggregate outcomes.
In the synthetic construction, record did not imply access, access did not imply normalized capability, and irreversibility did not imply finality.
The hierarchy survived the implemented controls only as a fallible typed diagnostic, not as a strict sequence.

blocked_founding_motivation.statement: GU-001 motivates the ownership and seam problem but cannot enter receiving assessment or a substantive gate run at the pinned revision.

genuinely_open_claims.statement: The six diagnostic types are complete, universal, fundamental, or ontologically real.
The diagnosis is invariant under substantive admissible reformulation.
Access can always be normalized away from capability without circularity.
A real physical case passes the packet and full gate sequence.
Physical finality exists as a non-factorable explanatory kind.
GU, TI, or TaF supplies an accepted physical confirmation of the candidate story.

rivals.name: Reductive dynamics and coarse-graining are enough
rivals.steelman: A sufficiently complete state space, dynamics, boundary conditions, and coarse-graining explain records, access, task sets, apparent selection, and the arrow of time. Capability summarizes constrained reachability, and finality names effective irreversibility or omission of the larger model rather than a new explanatory kind.
observations_favoring_rival: Every preregistered finality candidate factors through a defensible enlarged dynamics, boundary condition, or coarse-graining.
Record, access, and capability diagnoses add no stable prediction or explanatory compression beyond the complete dynamical model.
Normalization frames are derivable from the dynamics rather than independently chosen.
Apparent settlement reopens under an admissible embedding or continuation.
observations_favoring_candidate_over_riv: A stable diagnosis or prediction remains after the strongest admissible dynamical and boundary-condition factorization succeeds as far as it can.
The typed distinctions compress or predict outcomes across equivalent formulations that the reductive account treats only case by case.

rivals.name: Operational context is primary
rivals.steelman: Tasks, agents, resources, access, controls, and success criteria jointly constitute capability. Holding access fixed can remove the relation that makes a capability meaningful, so the access-capability boundary is a context-dependent bookkeeping choice rather than a general physical distinction.
observations_favoring_rival: Equally admissible observer, task, resource, or control frames yield different capability diagnoses with no invariant quotient.
Access-constitutive cases repeatedly produce construction forks rather than a stable normalized capability relation.
The chosen normalization frame already entails the desired capability verdict.
Context-relative models predict interventions better than a normalized context-independent task set.
observations_favoring_candidate_over_riv: Independent reviewers recover an invariant normalized capability comparison across admissible contexts.
Access-only changes and capability changes produce distinct, preregistered intervention consequences.

rivals.name: Explanatory plurality is irreducible
rivals.steelman: Different physical domains support locally successful but non-reducible explanatory grammars. The six-type vocabulary may be a comparison tool, while repeated hierarchy revision shows that there is no single universal joint object.
observations_favoring_rival: Multiple well-specified real cases require the same stable missing explanatory type.
Cross-domain mapping erases load-bearing distinctions or worsens prediction.
No shared normalization or gate vocabulary survives across domains.
Several incompatible taxonomies remain equally invariant and empirically adequate.
observations_favoring_candidate_over_riv: The same typed distinctions and gates classify heterogeneous real packets without source-specific reinterpretation.
Hierarchy revision remains rare, local, and repairable rather than systematically domain-indexed.

rivals.name: Constraint and consistency are more fundamental than the arc
rivals.steelman: Possibility, dynamics, records, access, capability, and settlement are representation-dependent projections of one invariant global constraint or consistency object. The explanatory arc adds vocabulary but no independent structure.
observations_favoring_rival: All six diagnoses derive as projections of one invariant constraint object.
Construction forks collapse under the constraint formulation.
The constraint account reproduces every discrimination with fewer independent assumptions.
No case classified by the typed vocabulary escapes the constraint account.
observations_favoring_candidate_over_riv: Two cases with the same global consistency structure differ predictively by record, access, or normalized capability type.
The typed decomposition exposes a stable operational distinction lost by the constraint projection.

confidence_calibration.basis: Explicit distinctions and substantial synthetic controls; no real accepted packet.
The blocked preflight demonstrates disciplined stopping; accepted interoperability remains untested.
No real-case coverage and explicit hierarchy-revision outcomes.
No finality gate has run on a real accepted packet.
GU-001 is NOT_YET_IMPORTABLE and all substantive gates are NOT_RUN.

basis: The repository has explicit packet, dependence, gate, transition, construction-fork, and negative-outcome interfaces.
A source-issued valid packet gives a concrete bounded receiver sequence.
Upstream packet preparation and independently defensible normalization and factorization choices remain the main bottlenecks.

candidate_killers: Access and capability cannot be separated without circular normalization.
Every finality candidate factors through a defensible earlier-layer model.
A simpler reductive or constraint account matches every discrimination and predicts more.
Real cases repeatedly expose a stable missing type.
No real packet survives intake and the full gate sequence.
falsifiers: A diagnosis changes under a source-certified physically equivalent representation.
Access and normalized capability cannot be separated without a conclusion-entailing frame.
Every well-formed finality candidate factors through a defensible earlier-layer construction.
A reductive or constraint-first account matches every discrimination with fewer assumptions and better prediction.
Repeated real cases expose a stable missing explanatory type or require irreducibly domain-specific grammars.
No physically meaningful source-issued packet can survive the complete receiver sequence without semantic distortion.
nonclaims: The candidate is not a unified theory, new fundamental law, or chronology.
The six types are not claimed complete, universal, mutually exclusive, or ontologically fundamental.
Candidate finality is not proof of finality, collapse, temporal issuance, free will, or cosmological closure.
Synthetic validation is not empirical evidence.
GU, TI, TaF, and WI-069 truth and claim status remain with their source owners.
reopening_conditions: The first real Frozen-Packet v0.2 object passes intake.
GU issues a candidate GU-001 bundle at a newly pinned revision.
A real case makes access constitutive of capability.
A substantive admissible reformulation changes diagnosis.
A rival matches or exceeds discrimination with fewer assumptions.
